title: Fig. 3 in Species-specific qPCR assays allow for high-resolution population assessment of four species avian schistosome that cause swimmer's itch in recreational lakes
author: Rudko, Sydney P.

description: Fig. 3. Lifecycles of T. stagnicolae, A. brantae, T. szidati, and T. physellae. life cycle summary of the avian schistosome species targeted for species-specific qPCR tests designed in this study.
